summary: Iteration 4: Verified test architecture restructuring. All 48 pytest tests pass. Root /app/backend/tests/ dir confirmed absent. Per-app integration tests present. Frontend loads with posts visible.

minor.issue: HMAC key is 31 bytes, below recommended 32-byte minimum for SHA256 (InsecureKeyLengthWarning) - not a blocker but worth fixing

action_items: Optional: Extend JWT secret key to at least 32 bytes to fix InsecureKeyLengthWarning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test architecture enforced: no root tests/ dir, each app owns tests under apps/<app>/tests/. 48 tests collected and passing with pytest-xdist (-n 2). Frontend homepage loads with posts and category filters visible. Auth flows working.

test_results.per_app_integration_tests: PASS - accounts, posts, ai all have integration test files
test_results.homepage_loads: PASS - frontend loads with hero, category filters, post cards visible
